briefings.title: CVE-2026-28318: SolarWinds Serv-U actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: SolarWinds Serv-U contains an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability that allows specially crafted POST requests using the Content-Encoding: deflate header to crash the Serv-U service without authentication.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-45247: Mirasvit Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could allow unauthenticated attackers to achieve remote code execution by supplying a crafted serialized PHP object in the…

briefings.title: CVE-2022-0492: Linux Kernel actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Linux Kernel contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow for privilege escalation via the cgroups v1 release_agent feature.

briefings.title: CVE-2023-54352 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: WordPress Seotheme contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code by uploading malicious files to the theme directory. Attackers can access the uploaded PHP shell at…

briefings.title: CVE-2024-58348 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: WordPress Background Image Cropper version 1.2 contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files by accessing the ups.php endpoint. Attackers can upload PHP files through the…

briefings.title: CVE-2024-58349 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: WordPress Theme Travelscape 1.0.3 contains an arbitrary file upload vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload malicious files by exploiting insufficient validation in the theme's upload functionality. Attackers can…
